title: fagus americana f. caroliniana
intro: Fagus americana f. caroliniana, also known as the American beech, is a subspecies of beech tree native to the southeastern United States. The medicinal properties of Fagus americana f. caroliniana include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve stress, and lower blood pressure due to its high levels of flavonoids and other antioxidants. The health benefits of this plant include improved cardiovascular health, reduced risk of chronic diseases, and enhanced immune function. Herbal preparations of Fagus americana f. caroliniana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are traditionally used to support the body's natural defenses and promote overall well-being.
